stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the definition of the rectangular area beyond the end of TORA over the ground or water extending laterally from the runway centreline?

options.a: Stopway extending 150 m on each side of the centreline.
options.b: Runway strip extending 75 m on each side of the centreline.
options.c: RESA extending 90 m on each side of the centreline.
options.d: Clearway extending 75 m on each side of the runway centreline.
